query_title: The Chaos Class Failed the Class

recommendations.title: The Chaos Class Is Waking Up
recommendations.overview: A sincere and hardworking student joins the Chaos Class, but acceptance seems unlikely when he becomes the target of their pranks.

recommendations.overview: Clumsy soldiers Şaban and Ramazan fall for a singer-dancer and accidentally become secret policemen tracking down a missing diamond.

recommendations.title: The Chorus
recommendations.overview: In 1940s France, a new teacher at a school for disruptive boys gives hope and inspiration.

recommendations.title: Freedom Writers

recommendations.title: Detachment

recommendations.title: Close
recommendations.overview: Two 13-year-old boys spend an idyllic summer together, but their connection is put to the test when they become the subject of speculation at school.

recommendations.title: School's Out
recommendations.overview: A few days before the baccalaureate, a high school student decides to settle accounts with the most cowardly teacher in the school.
